questions.question: What is the time complexity of iterating over a list of size n once?
questions.explanation: We iterate through n elements once: O(n).

questions.question: Binary search on sorted array of size n?
questions.explanation: Halves search space each step: log2(n) steps.

questions.question: faster for large n: O(n) or O(n**2)?
questions.explanation: O(n) grows much slower than O(n**2).
